properties.name: Coeur d'Alene Upper Pressure Zone
properties.ownerOperator: City of Coeur d'Alene Water Department
properties.sourceBasis: City water plan and 2018 council records identify the Industrial Standpipe's relationship to the Upper Pressure Zone. No public drawable pressure-zone polygon has been added.
publicNotes: The Industrial Standpipe is documented as a steel standpipe on the Upper Pressure Zone.
The Upper Pressure Zone relationship is source-backed, but the pressure-zone boundary itself has not been digitized.
No accessible public pressure-zone polygon has been added yet.
Find a public, non-restricted pressure-zone/service-area map before expanding this into a drawable boundary.

sources.label: City of Coeur d'Alene 2012 Water System Comprehensive Plan Update
